value.text: The Author: Timeline
Death of J.R.R. Tolkien from a stomach ulcer

The "Book of the Foxrook" (hereafter simply "Foxrook") is a small notebook of 16 pages (16x10 cm) composed by Tolkien in 1909 […] the page photographically reproduced in the exhibition catalogue is almost entirely in Esperanto.
Sometime during this period (c. 1905-11) it is clear that Tolkien also learned and used Esperanto.
